subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the Book in truth and therein summoned all unto His Self, the One Who ruleth over all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الکتاب بالحق و فیه دعا الکل الی نفسه المهیمنه علی العالمین
